title: tropaeolum hybridum
intro: Tropaeolum hybridum, also known as the Nasturtium, is an annual flowering plant native to South America. It has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to treat wounds and soothe digestive issues. The health benefits of Tropaeolum hybridum include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and act as a natural antihistamine. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and salves, which are often used to treat skin irritations and respiratory issues.
